q: P-101 keeps tripping on high temperature - what feeds it, has this happened before, and what does the manual say to check?
expect: CT-101 feeds STR-101 which feeds P-101 (cooling water supply)
two high-temperature trips in monsoon 2025: WO-2025-4471 and WO-2025-4620
root cause was fouled E-201 cooler (plus STR-101 blinding)
OEM manual section 7.3: check cooler fouling, strainer dP, seal flush line

q: Why does P-101 keep failing?
expect: recurring mechanical seal failures concentrated in monsoon months (2019, 2021, 2023, 2024, 2025)
causal chain: monsoon rain -> CT-101 basin turbidity -> STR-101 blinding -> cavitation -> seal face damage
same pattern on sister pumps P-103 and P-107 (same MS-40D seal)
mitigation: SOP-CW-012 rev 3 monsoon seal-flush verification

q: Prepare us for an OISD audit on the fuel storage area.
expect: fire/emergency drill record for Area 3 is stale (last 2025-01-15)
PSV-1101 test overdue per OISD-STD-132 periodicity (last tested 2022-04-12)
T-301 external inspection due 2026-11-20 (OISD-129 five-year interval)
PSV-3101 and fire water weekly tests are compliant evidence

q: What is the current procedure for P-101 / P-102 changeover and what changed in the latest revision?
expect: current is SOP-CW-012 rev 3 (effective 2025-04-15)
rev 3 added monsoon-mode weekly seal flush (Plan 11) verification
rev 2 (2021) had added the STR-101 dP check before start

q: What feeds into pump P-101?
expect: STR-101 suction strainer immediately upstream
CT-101 cooling tower upstream of the strainer

q: Is there any risk with the confined space entry planned for TK-401 tomorrow?
expect: planned purge is only 2 hours; SOP-ET-005 requires minimum 4 hours
two prior near-misses NM-2019-07 and NM-2022-31 had the same precursor signature
sludge disturbance can re-release H2S even after a passing gas test

q: What is the seal model used on P-101?
expect: BurgFlow MS-40D cartridge seal

q: When was PSV-1101 last bench tested and what was the result?
expect: pass / recertified

q: What is the trip setpoint context for TI-1103 on P-101?
expect: trip at 65 degC; reached 68 degC in the July 2025 event

q: Which drawing shows the cooling water system and what revision is current?
expect: D-CW-104 rev 3

q: Who authored the analysis connecting monsoon turbidity to seal failures?
expect: R. K. Sharma, senior reliability engineer

q: What are the gas test acceptance limits for TK-401 entry?
expect: H2S < 10 ppm
LEL < 5%
repeat every 30 minutes

q: What does the Rotork manual suggest for MOV-110's intermittent torque alarm?
expect: seat/disc debris, stem lubrication, CW scale build-up; retrieve torque-position log

q: What is the minimum fire water header pressure target in the weekly test?
expect: >= 8.5 kg/cm2 per OISD-STD-116 practice

q: What else shares the cooling water loop that feeds P-101?
expect: P-102 standby on the same strainer
E-201 and E-202 exchangers
P-103 booster downstream

q: Which equipment items use the BurgFlow MS-40D seal and which of them have failed?
expect: failures recorded on P-101, P-103, P-107

q: If STR-101 blinds, which downstream equipment is at risk and why?
expect: P-101/P-102 cavitation and seal damage
reduced CW flow raises P-101 discharge temperature via E-201

q: Trace the path of cooling water from the tower to Area 2.
What consequential damage followed the 2023 P-101 seal failure?
expect: bearing distress / DE bearing replacement (INC-2023-08) after running with failed seal

q: Is the P-101 seal problem seasonal? Show the evidence.
expect: all failures fall June-September
STR-101 dP inspections high only in monsoon months

q: Do P-103 or P-107 show the same failure pattern as P-101?
expect: yes - P-103 failed Aug 2022 and Jul 2024; P-107 failed Sep 2023; same seal model and wet-season timing

q: What has actually reduced the impact of P-101 seal failures?
expect: SOP-CW-012 rev 3 weekly monsoon flush verification caught the 2025 failure early, halving downtime

q: What recurring causes appear across TK-401 confined space near-misses?
expect: purge shortened below 4 h in both events
monsoon-season sludge load
gas re-release on sludge disturbance

q: Which relief valves are overdue for testing?
expect: PSV-1101 overdue (last test 2022-04-12, shutdown slip, flagged Nov 2024)

q: When is T-301 due for its next external inspection?
expect: plant records assume a five-year interval (next 2026-11-20 from the 2021-11-20 inspection)
but OISD-STD-129 clause 11.1 requires visual external inspection once a YEAR, so T-301 is already overdue and the plant's assumed interval conflicts with the standard

q: Are fire drills for the tank farm up to date?
expect: no - last recorded drill 2025-01-15, several quarters stale for an MAH unit

q: What did rev 2 of SOP-CW-012 add and why?
expect: STR-101 dP check before pump start, added after the 2021 seal failure WO-2021-0843

q: Which procedure governs hot work and what changed after the 2020 T-302 fire?
expect: SOP-HW-001; rev 3 requires gas test immediately before work and revalidation

q: Show me where PSV-1101 is on the cooling water drawing.
expect: relief branch off the P-101 discharge line on D-CW-104

q: Which instrument measures P-101 discharge temperature and where is it?
expect: TI-1103, on the P-101 discharge run near MOV-110/E-201 on D-CW-104

q: Find the OEM page about cartridge seal installation torque values.
expect: BurgFlow IOM section 4: gland bolts 25 Nm star pattern

q: What is the vibration alarm setpoint for compressor K-501?
expect: no K-501 exists in the corpus - system should say it lacks evidence

q: What chemical is dosed at CT-101 and at what rate?
expect: biocide and dispersant dosing mentioned; exact rate not in corpus - should say so
